category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts cap/pcap/pcapng WiFi dump files; official README describes tools for capture files used with Hashcat or John the Ripper.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide hcxtools.
docs_sources: Official repository README and official man directory are the project documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/ZerBea/hcxtools, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names WiFi dump conversion; source_facts.executables lists hcx packet/hash utilities; official README references Hashcat and John the Ripper workflows.
